title: Episode 260618/ 				  18 Jun 2026
content:
# BBC Learning English 今日阅读

## 文章标题
Episode 260618/ 18 Jun 2026 – Screen Time and Children

## 原文内容
(Images: Getty)_____________________________________________________________________________________________________

______________________________________________________________________________________________________

Try more episodes of 6 Minute English:

______________________________________________________________________________________________________

Many parents worry that their children spend too much time on screens. Governments around the world, such as in the UK, Australia and China, are introducing online safety measures to limit the amount of screen time for children or prevent them accessing social media. Neil and Becca talk about their own screen time and teach you some new vocabulary.

According to The UK media regulator, how many children aged three to four have a smartphone? Is it:

a) one in twenty
b) one in ten
c) one in five

Listen to the programme to hear the answer.

intentional
acting with that plan or reason in mind

the bar needs to be higher
make your expectations higher

enable
encourage someone’s ability to do something, or to make something possible

eager
want to do or have something very much

set someone up for something
prepare someone for something

Note: This is not a word-for-word transcript.

Becca
And I'm Becca. Neil, I’ve noticed that you’re pretty good at not checking your phone at work. How much time do you spend on your phone outside of work?

## 高频词汇学习

- **intentional** /ɪnˈtenʃənəl/
  - 词性：adj.
  - 中文释义：故意的，有意的
  - 原文例句："intentional acting with that plan or reason in mind"
  - 搭配用法：be intentional about (对……有意的)；intentional act (故意行为)

- **enable** /ɪˈneɪbl/
  - 词性：v.
  - 中文释义：使能够，使可能
  - 原文例句："enable encourage someone’s ability to do something, or to make something possible"
  - 搭配用法：enable sb to do sth (使某人能够做某事)

- **eager** /ˈiːɡər/
  - 词性：adj.
  - 中文释义：渴望的，热切的
  - 原文例句："eager want to do or have something very much"
  - 搭配用法：be eager to do sth (渴望做某事)；eager anticipation (热切期待)

- **set someone up for something** /set ˈsʌmwʌn ʌp fɔːr ˈsʌmθɪŋ/
  - 词性：phrasal verb
  - 中文释义：为某人准备好某事
  - 原文例句："set someone up for something prepare someone for something"
  - 搭配用法：set sb up for success (为某人成功做好准备)

- **screen time** /skriːn taɪm/
  - 词性：n.
  - 中文释义：屏幕时间（使用电子设备的时间）
  - 原文例句："Many parents worry that their children spend too much time on screens."
  - 搭配用法：limit screen time (限制屏幕时间)；excessive screen time (过度的屏幕时间)

- **online safety measures** /ˌɒnlaɪn ˈseɪfti ˈmeʒəz/
  - 词性：n.
  - 中文释义：网络安全措施
  - 原文例句："Governments around the world... are introducing online safety measures to limit the amount of screen time for children."
  - 搭配用法：implement online safety measures (实施网络安全措施)

- **regulator** /ˈreɡjuleɪtər/
  - 词性：n.
  - 中文释义：监管机构
  - 原文例句："According to The UK media regulator, how many children aged three to four have a smartphone?"
  - 搭配用法：media regulator (媒体监管机构)；financial regulator (金融监管机构)

- **the bar needs to be higher** /ðə bɑːr niːdz tuː biː ˈhaɪər/
  - 词性：phrase
  - 中文释义：标准需要提高
  - 原文例句："the bar needs to be higher make your expectations higher"
  - 搭配用法：raise the bar (提高标准)；set the bar high (设定高标准)

- **access** /ˈækses/
  - 词性：v.
  - 中文释义：访问，使用
  - 原文例句："prevent them accessing social media"
  - 搭配用法：access the internet (访问互联网)；access social media (使用社交媒体)

- **limit** /ˈlɪmɪt/
  - 词性：v./n.
  - 中文释义：限制，限度
  - 原文例句："limit the amount of screen time for children"
  - 搭配用法：limit to (限制在……)；time limit (时间限制)

## 阅读理解练习

1. 根据文章，许多父母担心什么？
   A. 孩子在学校表现不好
   B. 孩子在屏幕前花费太多时间
   C. 孩子不交朋友
   D. 孩子不运动
   
   答案：B

2. 哪些国家正在引入网络安全措施来限制儿童屏幕时间？
   A. 只有英国
   B. 只有中国和澳大利亚
   C. 英国、澳大利亚和中国
   D. 只有美国
   
   答案：C

3. 文章中提到的问题是什么？
   A. 有多少三到四岁的孩子有智能手机？
   B. 孩子们每天应该有多少屏幕时间？
   C. 父母如何限制屏幕时间？
   D. 社交媒体对儿童的影响是什么？
   
   答案：A

4. 根据文章，以下哪个词汇的意思是“鼓励某人做某事的能力”？
   A. intentional
   B. enable
   C. eager
   D. regulator
   
   答案：B

5. 短语“the bar needs to be higher”的意思是？
   A. 酒吧需要更高
   B. 标准需要提高
   C. 障碍需要更高
   D. 分数需要更高
   
   答案：B

## 今日学习要点

### 语法要点：动词不定式作目的状语
在文章中，我们看到句子："Governments... are introducing online safety measures to limit the amount of screen time for children." 这里，"to limit" 是动词不定式，表示目的。这是英语中常用的表达方式，用于说明某动作的目的。例如：
- I study hard to get good grades.（我努力学习是为了取得好成绩。）
- She exercises every day to stay healthy.（她每天锻炼以保持健康。）

### 表达技巧：使用“such as”举例
文章中使用“such as in the UK, Australia and China”来举例说明哪些国家在采取措施。这是一种非常实用的表达方式，可以让你的英语更自然、更丰富。例如：
- Many fruits, such as apples and bananas, are healthy.（很多水果，比如苹果和香蕉，都很健康。）
- I enjoy outdoor activities, such as hiking and cycling.（我喜欢户外活动，比如徒步和骑行。）

### 文化背景知识：屏幕时间与儿童健康
本文讨论的屏幕时间问题是一个全球性话题。近年来，随着智能手机和平板电脑的普及，各国政府和家长越来越关注儿童使用电子设备的时间。世界卫生组织（WHO）建议：2-4岁儿童每天屏幕时间不应超过1小时，且越少越好；5-17岁儿童和青少年应限制久坐屏幕时间，并保证足够的体育活动。不同国家采取了不同措施，例如中国对未成年人的游戏时间进行了严格限制，英国则建议家长制定家庭媒体使用计划。这个话题也反映了现代科技如何影响儿童发展，以及平衡数字生活与现实生活的重要性。
